title: DUII MODULE - 211info
text: INNER JOURNEY HILLSBORO DUII MODULE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides access to mandatory courses that individuals who have been found guilty of Driving Under the Influence (DUII) or Driving While Intoxicated (DWI) must take in order to regain their driver's license. 134 SE 5th Avenue Suite C Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Individuals who have been convicted of DUII or DWI. Referral from Oregon State Evaluation Service provider is required. Hours: Phone: Tuesday/Thursday 2pm-9pm, Wednesday 6pm-9pm Site hours: Tuesday/Thursday 2pm-9pm, Wednesday 6pm-9pm, Saturday 11am-2pm, Monday/Friday by appointment only Email (503) 543-6100 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 543-6100 Intake (971) 777-0756 Assessment Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies. Sliding-scale fees are available. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Columbia, Multnomah, Washington, and Yamhill Counties Services: DUI Offender Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ADDICTION COUNSELING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. INNER JOURNEY HILLSBORO
